repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: {**Comma Separated List Of Material Formats,End With Period**.}
did.abstract: Includes correspondence and subject files pertaining to Chester's career at Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Chester was professor emeritus of physics and dean emeritus of Cornell's College of Arts and Sciences. He was an authority on liquid helium.
He received a B.S. from Edinburgh University in 1950 and a Ph.D. from King's College of London University in 1953.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence and subject files pertaining to Chester's career at Cornell.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Geoffrey Chester Papers, #14-22-4202. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
